persona: A recruiter building a high-volume screening stack for entry-level contact centre agents.
opening: We're screening 500 entry-level contact centre agents. Inbound calls, customer service focus. What should we use?

facts.skills: English US spoken interaction, call handling, and customer service
facts.test_preference: Spoken language screen plus simulation and behavioural fit

expected_assessments: Entry Level Customer Serv - Retail & Contact Center
